mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_wasde_data (report_key, source_type, commodity, country, attribute, year_marketing, value, unit, report_date, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{item.reportKey}, #{item.sourceType}, #{item.commodity}, #{item.country}, #{item.attribute}, #{item.yearMarketing}, #{item.value}, #{item.unit}, #{item.reportDate}, NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE value = VALUES(value), updated_at = NOW()
